violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Cases of food was stored on the floor in the walk in cooler.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use cups were stored on the floor in the kitchen.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed a soda bib stored on the floor.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Observed paper products stored on the floor in the kitchen.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
